article_title: Storytelling and the Ethics of Representation
item: Consent visibility and testimony risk review
claim_context: testimony image consent platform circulation and exposure risk audit
governance_note: Medium-priority editorial review recommended. Risk signals are elevated. Review power, omissions, ethical framing, and distortion. Record note: Escalate stories where testimony, exposure, consent, or platform circulation create safety and dignity risks.
